title: Eating Animations More Mod Compatibility [FORGE/FABRIC]
body: Add compatibility for mods with [Eating animation(Fabric)](https://modrinth.com/mod/eating-animation)/[Eating Animations(Forge)](https://modrinth.com/mod/eating-animations) and fix some errors that [Eating Animations+](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/eating-animations) ### Mod Compatibility & Fixes: - [**Aether**](https://modrinth.com/mod/aether) - [**Aether Delight**](https://modrinth.com/mod/the-aethers-delight) - [**Aether: Redux**](https://modrinth.com/mod/the-aether-redux) - [**Artifacts Delight**](https://modrinth.com/mod/artifacts-delight) - [**Bosses of Mass Destruction**](https://modrinth.com/mod/bosses-of-mass-destruction) & [**Forge**](https://modrinth.com/mod/bosses-of-mass-destruction-forge) - [**Born in Chaos**](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/born-in-chaos) - **Born in Chaos Delight** (from [**Compat Delight**](https://modrinth.com/mod/compat-delight)) - [**Call of Yucatán**](https://modrinth.com/mod/call-of-yucutan) - [**Caverns & Chasms**](https://modrinth.com/mod/caverns-and-chasms) - [**Critters n' Crawlers**](https://modrinth.com/mod/critters-n-crawlers) - [**Ender's Delight**](https://modrinth.com/mod/enders-delight) - [**Drop the Meat**](https://modrinth.com/mod/dropthemeat) [_(Combine with Eating Animations+)_](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/eating-animations) - [**Farmer´s Delight**](https://modrinth.com/mod/farmers-delight) - [**Fungi Stew**](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/fungi-stew) - [**Fungus Stew**](https://modrinth.com/mod/fungus-stew) - [**Golden Delicacies**](https://modrinth.com/mod/golden-delicacies) - [**Inka**](https://modrinth.com/mod/inka) - [**Jaden's Nether Expansion**](https://modrinth.com/mod/jadens-nether-expansion) - [**Legionary**](https://modrinth.com/mod/legionary) - [**[Let's Do] Beachparty**](https://modrinth.com/mod/lets-do-beachparty) - [**[Let's Do] Meadow**](https://modrinth.com/mod/lets-do-meadow) - [**Loot & Explore (More RPG Content)**](https://modrinth.com/mod/loot-n-explore) & [**(LNE Add-Ons)**](https://modrinth.com/user/Fichte) - [**Minecraft**](https://www.minecraft.net/) (Small Details) - [**Mineral Delight**](https://modrinth.com/mod/mineral-delight-port) - [**Nether´s Delight**](https://modrinth.com/mod/nethers-delight) & [**Fabric**](https://modrinth.com/mod/nethers-delight-refabricated) - [**Ocean´s Delight**](https://modrinth.com/mod/oceans-delight) - [**Quark**](https://modrinth.com/mod/quark) - [**Quark Delight**](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/quark-delight) - [**Queen Cats & Dogs**](https://modrinth.com/mod/queen-cats-dogs) - [**Slimy Stuff**](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/slimy-stuff) - [**Supplementaries**](https://modrinth.com/mod/supplementaries) [_(Combine with Eating Animations+)_](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/eating-animations) - [**Rotten Creatures**](https://modrinth.com/mod/rottencreatures) - [**Twilight Forest**](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/the-twilight-forest) [_(Combine with Twilight Forest: JAPPA Pack_](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/twilight-forest-jappa-pack) _&_ [_Eating Animations+)_](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/eating-animations) - [**Twilight's Flavor & Delight**](https://modrinth.com/mod/twilight-delight) [_(Combine with Eating Animations+)_](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/eating-animations) - [**Twilight Forest Artifacts**](https://modrinth.com/mod/twilight-forest-artifacts) - [**Vanilla Cookbook**](https://modrinth.com/mod/vanillacookbook) [_(Combine with Eating Animations+)_](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/eating-animations) - [**Victus**](https://modrinth.com/mod/victus) - [**YUNG's Cave Biomes**](https://modrinth.com/mod/yungs-cave-biomes) ![Example](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4246a2f8c22860748f91bac07c96738a6ea569a9.gif) ## Other mods compatibilities in parts: ## Other resourcepacks compatibilities in parts: ### Specific order (to avoid any type of texture error) I recommend installing ([Eating Animations+](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/eating-animations)) Because this package also corrects some errors in version 1.20.x ![v](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b2eac7eb020f46f0fbc383fb7b1d19c8700cd29e.png) ### Some Meals Compat with Eat Animation (Including Eatanimations+ 1.10 arrangements) ![c](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d1e2deee1ea1bba9bd4a9a726b6b4ebbf14d9bae.png) ### This pack adds new compatibilities and fixes things from another pack
